title: Celestial Lib
description: A library mod for space exploration mods, like Celestial Exploration
body:
A library mod for space exploration mods.

Extracted from beta versions of [Celestial Exploration](https://modrinth.com/mod/celestial-exploration), now into its own library!

- assign a space or empty dimension to be a "galaxy"
- create structures to represent "planets", and set up teleportation to/from planets and the galaxy
- set up various gravity effects on planets, and implement spacesuits/armor that can negate those effects when worn
- add additional planets through datapacks
- light speed travel system for traveling between galaxies, especially for use in modpacks with multiple space mods (for whenever it is I write those other mods…)
